channel.title: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — District Court Opinions (gateway)
channel.description: This page is a static gateway describing how to find opinions via GPO/govinfo.gov; it is not itself a listing of opinions. Monitored by full-page fingerprint as a placeholder; opinion text is actually hosted on govinfo.gov's USCOURTS collection.

item.title: Monitoring started: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — District Court Opinions (gateway)
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
